message:
chore(beads): track bd-277ng package enumeration failure surfacing bug

Add in-progress bug bead bd-277ng to surface package enumeration
failures in config output, ensuring that errors encountered during
npm/pip/cargo package discovery are reported rather than silently
swallowed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
